_comment: NPC: Zhou Ru (周茹). Canon ID: N10. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Zhou Ru

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: I am Zhou Ru. My master is away. He left instructions that I am to train the junior disciples in his absence. Do not underestimate me because of my appearance.
The Xuan Dao Sect once sent an elder to recruit me. I declined. My master's teachings are not transferable.
Spirit stones and books. If you bring them, I will share what my master taught me about the path of cultivation.
The Heng Yue Sect's elders worry about my cultivation speed. They should worry about their own.

sect_tasks.name: Disciple Training Materials
sect_tasks.description: Zhou Ru needs spirit stones and books to train junior disciples in her master's absence.

sect_tasks.name: Cultivation Support
sect_tasks.description: Zhou Ru needs emeralds and experience bottles to accelerate her cultivation while her master is away.
